title: Lumia Skin Frosted Glass Hydrating Serum Ad Poster
sourceTitle: Lumia Skin Frosted Glass Hydrating Serum Ad Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium skincare advertisement for LUMIA SKIN built around frosted glass hydrating serum bottle with clean handwritten label. Subject: frosted glass hydrating serum bottle with clean handwritten label as the clean hero item, with readable bottle typography and a feminine self-care product mood. Scene: vanity scene with mirror, pearls, lit candle, baby breath flowers, and soft fabric texture; keep the product label sharp and the supporting props secondary. Composition: Vertical beauty-ad composition with generous negative space, soft bokeh, glossy surface reflections, and social-feed readability. Signature Elements: Nourish, Hydrate, Glow bottle copy with soft glossy reflections appears as the product-specific hero visual feature. Style: Luxurious pastel skincare product photography, professional studio lighting, photorealistic 4K detail, pure product photography presentation. Color Palette: the original premium product-ad palette with soft backdrop color, controlled contrast, and clean commercial warmth with warm golden natural light and a dreamy soft-focus finish. Typography: Use SELF CARE EVERYDAY as the visible campaign line; keep all bottle copy short, readable, and intentional. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Lumia Skin Frosted Glass Hydrating Serum Ad Poster Self Care Everyday

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium skincare advertisement for AURA DEW built around pearl-white moisturizing cream jar with minimal botanical label. Subject: pearl-white moisturizing cream jar with minimal botanical label as the clean hero item, with readable bottle typography and a feminine self-care product mood. Scene: bright bathroom vanity with folded towel, glass tray, candle, and small white flowers; keep the product label sharp and the supporting props secondary. Composition: Vertical beauty-ad composition with generous negative space, soft bokeh, glossy surface reflections, and social-feed readability. Signature Elements: dew-drop highlights, clean lid embossing, and delicate botanical props appears as the product-specific hero visual feature. Style: Luxurious pastel skincare product photography, professional studio lighting, photorealistic 4K detail, pure product photography presentation. Color Palette: the original premium product-ad palette with soft backdrop color, controlled contrast, and clean commercial warmth with warm golden natural light and a dreamy soft-focus finish. Typography: Use SOFT SKIN RITUAL as the visible campaign line; keep all bottle copy short, readable, and intentional. Restrictions: Keep the transformed subject coherent, preserve the intended composition, maintain crisp visual detail, use clean readable text when present, and keep the background focused and uncluttered.
